'''Shockwave generator rods''' were weapons mounted on [[Basilisk war droid/Legends|Basilisk war droids]]. A cluster of rods were mounted in the hose of the war [[Droid/Legends|droid]]. When activated, the rods combined their charges to release a [[Plasma/Legends|plasma]] burst capable of puncturing a [[Starship/Legends|starship's]] [[Hull/Legends|hull]].<ref name="EGTD" />
